creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Update to PowerDNS Recursor 3.7.1

"This version contains a mix of speedups and improvements, the combined effect of which is vastly improved resilience against traffic spikes and malicious query overloads."

Changelog: https://doc.powerdns.com/md/changelog/#powerdns-recursor-371

Added a last-minute patch required to fix the recursor on BSD's, which didn't make it into 3.7.1
